meta.source: Derived from cached HNA ACS profile records (DP04 counts → shares)

variables.pct_5_9: DP04_0011* share of HU in 5–9 unit structures
variables.pct_10_19: DP04_0012* share of HU in 10–19 unit structures
variables.pct_20p: DP04_0013* share of HU in 20+ unit structures

meta.geography_scope: Colorado: state + all counties + all places
meta.notes: Snapshot used by census-dashboard.html. The page no longer calls api.census.gov from the browser because unauthenticated requests now redirect to /missing_key.html (blocked by CORS).
